Dalit Mr Gandhi Reservation Writings & Speeches Writings and Speeches – English Writings and Speeches – Hindi Writings and Speeches – Marathi Annihilation of Caste-Dr Ambedkar Riddles in Hinduism Hinduism Buddhism Articles on Buddhism Sudhir Raj Singh Buddha Taal Ambedkar House London Activities Press Release Events Seminars Misc Videos Major News Hindi Flyers Popular Articles Opinion About Team Contact Ambedkarism AMBEDKARISM IS; a) AT A PERSONAL LEVEL, a human centred way of life, aimed at reduction of suffering in a selfless (unselfish), rational and ethical manner, free of dogma and superstition. b) AT A UNIVERSAL LEVEL, a human centred way of life aimed at reduction of suffering and injustice in society with a focus on social justice in a rational and ethical manner, free of dogma and superstition. The Root of Ambedkarism Ambedkarism, the thought/philosophy of Dr B.R. Ambedkar stems from his belief that.. “the ultimate aim of human existence should be the cultivation (and therefore expansion) of mind, developing the human being, leading to manifestation of liberty, equality, fraternity and social justice in society.” Learn More CATEGORIES WRITINGS ARTICLES CONSTITUTION AMBEDKAR HOUSE HINDUISM BUDDHISM CASTE RESERVATION ACTIVITIES QUOTES M. K.
